title: Ed Mcmichael
compiled_truth: Ed Mcmichael is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-22 to 2002-06-25), Ed Mcmichael sent 111 and received 761 emails, totalling 872 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (40), [Ruth Concannon](people/ruth-concannon) (23), [Louis Dicarlo](people/louis-dicarlo) (18), [Joe Parks](people/joe-parks) (17), [Robin Barbe](people/robin-barbe) (16).
